text.title: Modern BA Framework: BABOK for Agile, AI/ML, Cloud, and Platform Delivery Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the modern-ba-framework methodology end-to-end.

step.name: declare-perspectives
step.action: List explicit perspective set; reject 'agile' as the default-without-justification.

step.name: adapt-kas
step.action: For each KA, list perspective-specific tasks/deliverables.

step.name: template-deliverables
step.action: Pick correct template variants per perspective.

step.name: review
step.action: Cross-functional review; verify each perspective has concrete deliverables.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
